title: Hostile Mob Better Configuration - HMBC
description: Hostile Mob Better Configuration gives you full control over hostile mobs in Minecraft. Attribute and behavior, or turn mobs into powerfupl boss variants to create a completely new difficulty and combat experience. Each mob can also have its own name.
body:
THANKS TO ZAP-HOSTING! Use code Reggarf-1047 for 20% off any order!

https://zap-hosting.com/reggarf

 


Hostile Mob Better Configuration is a highly advanced configuration mod that allows complete control over All hostile mobs in Minecraft. It provides a detailed configuration system that lets you modify mob attributes, combat behavior, spawning mechanics, special abilities, and boss mechanics.

Every supported mob can be individually customized using a clean and organized configuration interface. Players and modpack creators can rebalance the difficulty of the game, create powerful boss encounters, or completely redesign mob behavior.

The configuration is divided into multiple categories including Overworld mobs, Nether mobs, End mobs, and major boss mobs.


This mod allows full customization of hostile mobs through a large set of configurable properties.

General configuration features include:

Custom mob names
Health and armor adjustments
Attack damage and knockback configuration
Movement speed and follow range
Spawn rate multipliers
Reinforcement summoning chances
Experience drop multipliers
Loot drop multipliers
Fire immunity options
Glowing effects
Door breaking behavior
Custom combat mechanics
Boss mode system

Each mob can be tuned individually to create unique gameplay experiences.

Dynamic Boss System

One of the main features of this mod is a dynamic boss system that transforms ordinary mobs into powerful elite enemies.

Any supported mob has a chance to spawn as a boss, gaining enhanced attributes, improved rewards, and a distinct identity.

Boss Tiers

Bosses are divided into multiple rarity tiers, each increasing their strength and rewards:

  • Common – Slightly stronger than normal mobs
  • Rare – Noticeably tougher with improved rewards
  • Epic – High threat level with significant scaling
  • Legendary – Dangerous enemies with major boosts
  • Mythical – Extremely powerful, endgame-level bosses

Each tier affects health, damage, experience, and loot, while also applying a unique color and visual distinction.

Configurable Features

The system is highly customizable, allowing full control over boss behavior:

  • Boss Mode toggle
  • Option to force all mobs to spawn as bosses
  • Adjustable boss spawn chance
  • Configurable health multiplier
  • Configurable damage multiplier
  • Configurable experience multiplier
  • Configurable loot multiplier
  • Optional glowing effect with tier-based colors
  • Optional custom boss names

Visual and Gameplay Enhancements

Bosses are scaled in size, making them more noticeable and intimidating.
They can also glow with colors based on their tier and display custom names such as:

  • Legendary Boss Zombie
  • Mythical Boss Creeper

The mod provides deep customization for many overworld hostile mobs.

Supported overworld mobs include:

Cave Spider
Creeper
Drowned
Enderman
Evoker
Guardian

Each mob can have its own independent configuration.

Examples of configurable attributes include:

Health
Armor
Attack damage
Knockback resistance
Attack knockback
Movement speed
Follow range
Spawn multiplier
Reinforcement chance
Loot multiplier
Experience multiplier
Fire immunity
Glowing effect

Additional mob-specific mechanics are also available.

Cave Spider Features

Cave spiders can be modified with poison mechanics and combat attributes.

Configurable features include:

Poison attack enable or disable
Poison duration multiplier
Poison amplifier multiplier
Attack damage and knockback
Movement speed and detection range

This allows cave spiders to become significantly more dangerous.

Creeper Features

Creepers can be heavily customized to change their explosion behavior.

Configurable features include:

Explosion radius
Explosion damage multiplier
Fuse time
Powered creeper spawning
Movement speed adjustments

This allows creepers to be turned into stronger or weaker explosive threats.

Drowned Features

Drowned mobs receive extensive aquatic behavior configuration.

Features include:

Armor spawn chance
Trident spawn chance
Fishing rod spawn chance
Nautilus shell spawn chance
Door breaking capability
Daytime spawning
Burn in daylight settings
Trident velocity and accuracy
Trident damage multiplier
Aggressive swimming behavior
Deep water spawn requirements

This allows drowned mobs to become specialized underwater enemies.

Enderman Features

Endermen behavior can be heavily modified.

Configurable mechanics include:

Teleport enable or disable
Teleport chance multiplier
Teleport range multiplier
Always aggressive mode
Rage movement speed multiplier
Block pickup ability
Water damage behavior

This allows endermen to become more aggressive or more manageable.

Evoker Features

Evokers gain many spell and raid configuration options.

Features include:

Fang spell damage multiplier
Vex summon enable or disable
Number of Vex summoned
Vex lifetime duration
Wololo sheep conversion ability
Raid combat bonuses

Raid bonuses include:

Raid health bonus
Raid damage bonus

This allows evokers to become more powerful raid leaders.

Guardian Features

Guardians can have their aquatic combat mechanics adjusted.

Features include:

Laser beam attack enable or disable
Laser damage multiplier
Laser attack duration
Thorns damage reflection
Targeting behavior

Target options include:

Players
Squid
Axolotl

These options allow guardians to behave differently in underwater environments.

Nether Mob Configuration

Nether hostile mobs are also fully configurable.

Supported mobs include:

Blaze
Ghast

Blaze Features

Blaze combat behavior can be heavily modified.

Configurable features include:

Fireball damage multiplier
Fireball burst count
Burst cooldown timing
Charge time before attacks
Vertical movement boost multiplier
Fall speed multiplier
Water damage behavior

These options allow blaze attacks to become faster, stronger, or more frequent.

Ghast Features

Ghasts have configurable ranged attack mechanics.

Features include:

Fireball explosion power
Charge time before firing
Cooldown between shots
Fireball damage multiplier
Fireball velocity multiplier
Floating movement speed
Floating movement range

This allows ghasts to become more aggressive aerial threats.

The mod also allows configuration of major Minecraft bosses.

Supported bosses include:

Elder Guardian
Ender Dragon

Elder Guardian Features

Elder Guardians can be configured with special boss mechanics.

Features include:

Laser attack enable or disable
Laser damage multiplier
Thorns damage reflection
Mining fatigue effect control

Mining fatigue settings include:

Effect radius
Effect duration
Effect strength
Interval between pulses

This allows the Elder Guardian to become a more strategic boss encounter.

Ender Dragon Features

The Ender Dragon has a large number of configurable mechanics.

Combat configuration includes:

Health
Armor
Flying speed
Attack damage
Head damage
Knockback damage

Special abilities include:

Dragon breath attack enable or disable
Dragon breath damage multiplier
End crystal healing enable or disable
Crystal heal amount
Crystal heal interval
Block breaking behavior

Vex Reinforcement System

The Ender Dragon can summon Vex reinforcements.

Configurable features include:

Spawn chance
Spawn count
Spawn radius
Maximum nearby Vex
Vex health
Vex movement speed
Vex attack damage
Target distance
Vex lifetime

The Vex system can also be restricted to activate only when the dragon is below half health.

Spawn and Reward Systems

For nearly all mobs the following systems can be configured:

Spawn multipliers
Reinforcement summon chance
Experience drop multipliers
Loot drop multipliers

This allows modpack creators to control game balance and progression.

Purpose of the Mod

Hostile Mob Better Configuration is designed for:

Modpack developers
Server administrators
Hardcore survival players
Custom challenge maps
Difficulty rebalancing

It gives full control over how hostile mobs behave, spawn, fight, and reward players.
